infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FitVault uses your microphone to let you describe your workout by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: FitVault uses speech recognition to convert your spoken workout description to text.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FitVault uses your camera to record a set and count reps. Video is analyzed on-device and never uploaded.

plugins.photosPermission: FitVault uses your photos to import workout plans.
plugins.cameraPermission: FitVault uses your camera to photograph workout plans.
